name: Benzoin
description: Having a chemical formula of PhCH(OH)C(O)Ph, benzoin is an organic compound consisting of a hydroxy ketone attached to two phenyl groups. It is synthesized from benzaldehyde in the benzoin condensation. Benzoin can be used as a precursor to benzil, which is a photoinitiator [Wikipedia]. According to the FDA, benzoin is a food additive permitted for direct addition to food for human consumption as a natural flavoring substance.
